prompt: Premium studio product shot of an AITX-branded insulated stainless-steel water bottle, standing upright, straight-on hero angle. Tall slim double-wall vacuum bottle with a matte black powder-coated finish, seamless body, a black threaded screw cap with a subtle knurled grip ring. A single tasteful orange (#ff4201) AITX open-arms mark placed at chest height, centered on the body, crisp and clean. Soft-touch matte texture with a gentle vertical highlight running down one side to convey the cylindrical form. High-end reusable drinkware, flagship merch quality. Clean neutral light-gray seamless studio backdrop, soft diffused key light from upper left, subtle elliptical soft shadow pooling at the base, delicate rim light on the right edge. Strict AITX palette: matte black bottle, one orange mark, no other logos or text. Sharp focus, 50mm lens, commercial catalog product photography.
